answer:
\boxed{Reverend Billy Graham}

The question refers to **Reverend Billy Graham**, the famous evangelist whose sermons were widely recorded and distributed, earning him the nickname *"The Man with the Million-Dollar Voice."* His sermon *"The Eagle Stirreth Her Nest"* (or similar titles) was one of his most popular messages. His influence in New York City (often linked to New Bethel Baptist Church) solidified his legacy.
